file.subject: Case PRIME-001
file.memory_type: Origin event of the Archive system
file.summary: The first memory ever recorded: a Keeper entering the Archive for the first time, a system attempting to define truth from human memory, and repeated failure to produce a single stable interpretation.

records.label: Content
records.value: A Keeper's first entry into the Archive

records.label: System behavior
records.value: Repeated failure to produce one stable interpretation

records.label: Maya reading
records.value: It was meant to protect continuity

records.label: Eden reading
records.value: It was meant to eliminate contradiction

file.verdict: Both readings of the Archive's purpose are incomplete.
file.objective: Determine why the system was created.
